/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/src/input/InputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/src/io/MJCFParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/src/io/STLLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/src/physics/PhysicsWorld.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/src/render/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/src/render/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/src/render/ShaderProgram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/src/ui/JointPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffw_teleop.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o ffw_teleop  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.4 -lepoxy /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libBulletDynamics.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libBulletCollision.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libLinearMath.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libBulletSoftBody.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtinyxml2.so.11.0.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
